articles.title: Watch Live: Senate holds "vote-a-rama" on ICE funding, rejects Democrats' move to ban DOJ fund - CBS News
articles.description: The Senate is holding a marathon vote series as Republicans seek to fund immigration agencies under the Department of Homeland Security without help from Democrats.

articles.title: Texas defeats Texas Tech for second consecutive WCWS national championship, Teagan Kavan again wins Most Outstanding Player - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Unlike last year, Texas Tech could not force a winner-take-all Game 3 against Texas in the Women's College World Series championship.

articles.title: Longtime CBS correspondent Scott Pelley lived many workers’ fantasy: Telling your boss off - AP News
articles.description: Scott Pelley may have lost his job after publicly blasting CBS management. But for many workers, he lived out a fantasy. In a staff meeting this week, the longtime “60 Minutes” correspondent questioned the qualifications of top executives and accused them of …

articles.title: ‘Everyone is apoplectic’: Inside Democrats’ blame game over Graham Platner - Politico
articles.description: A New York Times report with new allegations about the Democrat’s Nazi symbol tattoo and conduct with women has the party freaking out over its Maine Senate chances.

articles.title: ASTS, RKLB, RDW, SIDU Slip Overnight: Retail Hopes For SpaceX-Fueled S&P 500 Buying Frenzy Take A Hit - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: The drop came after a broad space rally on Thursday, driven by SpaceX's high-profile JPMorgan IPO roadshow.

articles.title: House Republicans break with Trump again to approve Ukraine aid - BBC
articles.description: Some 18 Republicans joined the Democrats to back the measure, after a smaller group broke ranks on another vote in recent days.

articles.title: Caitlin Clark, Angel Reese's Final Box Score Stats, Highlights as Fever Beat Dream - Bleacher Report
articles.description: The Indiana Fever are back in the win column thanks to an 83-71 victory over the Atlanta Dream on Thursday.

articles.title: Ivanka Trump and Jared Kushner’s Albanian resort plan sets off days of protests - The Washington Post
articles.description: The protests, raising concerns about conservation, transparency and the project’s ties to the Trump family, began Sunday in the Albanian capital, Tirana.

articles.title: ICE to stop reporting deaths of newly released detainees, internal memo says - The Washington Post
articles.description: The agency is facing pressure to improve medical care in its facilities after reporting the deaths of 18 detainees in the first five months of this year.

articles.title: Judge dismisses murder charge against Arkansas sheriff nominee who killed daughter's alleged abuser - CBS News
articles.description: A judge has dismissed a murder charge against Aaron Spencer, an Arkansas sheriff nominee who was accused of killing his teenage daughter's alleged abuser in 2024.

articles.title: Trump Makes It Official: The ‘Freedom 250’ Concerts Are Canceled — to Be Replaced With ‘the Greatest Rally EVER!,’ Starring Him and (Surprise) Lee Greenwood - Variety
articles.description: The president finally canceled the 'Freedom 250' concert series, to be replaced with 'the greatest rally ever,' starring himself and Lee Greenwood.

articles.title: South Korea stocks fall 5% as tech heavyweights follow plunge in Wall Street's AI-linked names - CNBC
articles.description: Asia-Pacific markets fell on Friday as investors assessed a rotation out of chip stocks on Wall Street that lifted the Dow Jones Industrial Average to a record close.

articles.title: Zelensky proposes direct meeting with Putin to end war - CNN
articles.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky called on Russian President Vladimir Putin to engage with him directly to end the war.

articles.title: S&P will not change the rules to allow SpaceX into its benchmark index early - Axios
articles.description: The mega-cap IPOs will have to wait.

articles.title: Republicans' sweeping election overhaul fails in the Senate - NPR
articles.description: The SAVE America Act, a far-reaching Republican election overhaul that President Trump said should be his congressional allies' top priority, has failed in the Senate.

articles.title: Live updates: Hezbollah and Israel trade new strikes as uncertainty surrounds US-Iran talks - CNN
articles.description: Washington and Tehran are issuing mixed messages about US-Iran war talks, and fighting continues between Israel and Hezbollah despite a fragile Lebanon ceasefire deal. Follow live updates.

articles.title: Live Updates: Karmelo Anthony murder trial in fatal stabbing of Austin Metcalf at Frisco ISD track meet - CBS News
articles.description: More than a year after the fatal stabbing of student-athlete Austin Metcalf at a Frisco track meet, the murder trial of Karmelo Anthony has began. Follow our live blog for updates from the courtroom.
